title: The Context Layer, Live — Atlan Activate 2026
summary: Atlan launches The Context Layer, Live at Activate 2026. New conversational search, data quality, agentic stewards features announced.

title: Introducing the Collibra AI Command Center
summary: Collibra launches the AI Command Center — a new product giving organizations 360° visibility and governance across all AI systems in heterogeneous environments. Launch webinar Apr 30 with live demo of new AI governance capabilities.

title: Data products — because agents need context
summary: Collibra co-founder Stijn Christiaens + MIT CISR researcher positioning data products as critical infrastructure for AI agents — arguing AI is only as effective as the data products it consumes. Direct signal of Collibra's catalog-as-AI-foundation strategy.

title: How to make your unstructured data AI-ready in minutes — Deasy Labs
summary: Collibra demonstrates Deasy Labs product: turns unstructured data into AI-ready datasets with context-rich metadata in a few clicks. Signals Collibra expanding catalog capabilities into unstructured data and AI-readiness — competing directly with Actian's data catalog positioning.

title: Collibra at Google Cloud Next '26
summary: Collibra exhibiting at Google Cloud Next '26 (Las Vegas, Apr 22–24). High foot traffic from data/AI buyers — SDR outreach opportunity before and after the event.

title: Collibra at Gartner Data & Analytics Summit 2026
summary: Collibra present at Gartner Data & Analytics Summit (London, May 11–13). Key analyst and enterprise buyer audience — strong SDR and marketing targeting opportunity around the event.

title: Collibra at SAP Sapphire 2026 (Orlando + Madrid)
summary: Collibra exhibiting at SAP Sapphire in both Orlando (May 11–13) and Madrid (May 19–21) — double presence signals deep SAP partnership investment. SAP+Collibra joint messaging is an active GTM motion to watch.

title: Collibra at Snowflake Summit 2026
summary: Collibra at Snowflake Summit (San Francisco, Jun 1–4). Collibra+Snowflake joint presence at a high-intent data buyer event — likely joint announcement or demo. Monitor for co-marketing signals.

title: Data Citizens on the Road 2026 — World Tour (Munich, SF, Paris)
summary: Collibra's global community roadshow hits Munich (Apr 21), San Francisco (May 28), and Paris (Jun 4). Their own-brand event series for data professionals — used to build pipeline and announce product updates to existing customers.
